seoTitle: Campwin Beach vs Canaga — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Campwin Beach and Canaga. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Campwin Beach vs Canaga: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Campwin Beach and Canaga.
heading: Campwin Beach vs Canaga — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Campwin Beach, Queensland and Canaga, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Campwin Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Canaga (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Campwin Beach or Canaga safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Campwin Beach has a flood risk score of 60/100, while Canaga scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Campwin Beach scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Canaga scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Campwin Beach or Canaga?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Campwin Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
